text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory and I are at a big park a ways
from the academy.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! What an amazing flower bed! The people
taking care of it must really care about their work!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm already getting super excited! Let's go look
around, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I walk around the park with a very
spirited Bamboo Memory.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this looks like the obstacle course! And the
area in the back is just for Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
They've got a course where you jump from rope
to rope till you reach the top of a hill, and
another where you stand on a log and try to roll it
around a pond! Sounds like fun!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, this really brings back memories. My dad
used to bring me to places like this back in the
day!

text_block_list.name: Young Bamboo
text_block_list.text:
Look, Dad! I can jump all the way to that rope
over there!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Father
text_block_list.text:
Nice going! You're the king of the jungle! Now
wait up, I'm on my way!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Uaaaaah-uah-uaaahhh! ♪

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Father
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! That was amazing, Bamboo! I'm so proud
of you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: (...Dad said I was amazing!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Um... hey, Trainer! I'm going to clear the whole
obstacle course! Check me out!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaaah! How do like me now?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, really?! Now, watch me clear the next one
in no time flat too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory clears one challenge after
another like she was born to swing!

text_block_list.name: Spectating Girl
text_block_list.text: Wow! Awesome! Look over there! She's amazing!

text_block_list.name: Spectating Boy
text_block_list.text:
Holy cow! How does she move like that?! It's like
she grew up swinging through the trees!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...!
Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
They haven't seen anything yet! Wait till you see
me swing to the finish with just one hand!

text_block_list.name: Spectating Girl
text_block_list.text: Hey! What are you gonna do next?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Good question! Next... I think I'll try getting that
log around the pond!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh! What's up, Trainer? You think I should try
something more difficult?
choice_data_list:
If those kids try to imitate you, it could be
dangerous!

text_block_list.text:
Hey!
That's not safe!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Um, excuse me, everyone! I'm sorry, but that's all
for today!

text_block_list.name: Spectating Girl
text_block_list.text:
Aw, really? ...Well, thank you! It was really fun
watching you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'm sorry. I got carried away again, huh?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
When you stopped me, it reminded me of
something. My dad always gave me so much
praise whenever I got excited, so I would always
get so carried away, until...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Mother
text_block_list.text: Hey! What are you two doing?! That's dangerous!

text_block_list.name: Young Bamboo
text_block_list.text: Agh! Mom?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Father
text_block_list.text: S-sorry about that...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Then, we would always talk about what happened
later as a family.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
When I think about it now, I really haven't
changed at all... Ugh, I'm so immature!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I really need to take this more seriously and get
myself under control!
choice_data_list: You should put that enthusiasm to good use.
You should put that enthusiasm to good use.

You just need to figure out the right moment to
let loose.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I really need to take this more seriously and get
myself under control!
choice_data_list: You should put that enthusiasm to good use.
You should put that enthusiasm to good use.

You just need to figure out the right moment to
let loose.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It goes without saying that it's not good to be
reckless, but passion is the energy that fuels
Bamboo Memory. There's no reason to let it go to
waste.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...!
You're right! Being passionate is who I am!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna keep on burning brightly without
sweating the details!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's head back so I can finish off the rest
of the obstacle c—
choice_data_list: Didn't we just agree that's too dangerous?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory is having a hard time finding the
right balance between passion and recklessness...
It seems she still has some growing to do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whether it's in racing, training, or working as part
of the disciplinary committee, her passion will
produce incredible results when the time is right.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! That makes it sound like I have to master
my power!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It's just like the training arc in a manga! I'm
getting kinda fired up now!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Trainer—no, Master! I'm going to work hard on
mental discipline too, and I'll need your help!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory is bursting with enthusiasm. It
looks like I'll need to keep an eye on her to make
sure things don't get out of hand.
